message:
feat(gateway): add auto-checkpoint and conflict detection services

Implements key components for checkpoint/restore system and conflict detection:

Auto-Checkpoint Service (auto-checkpoint.ts):
- Configurable checkpoint triggers: interval, message count, token threshold
- Error checkpoints for pre-error state capture
- Full checkpoint enforcement every 5th checkpoint
- Integration with agent lifecycle (spawn, terminate, message)

Conflict Detection Service (conflict.service.ts):
- Reservation overlap detection using pattern matching
- Git conflict detection (merge conflicts, potential conflicts)
- Resource contention detection with access tracking
- WebSocket event publishing for conflict lifecycle
- Recommended actions for conflict resolution

REST API Endpoints (conflicts.ts):
- GET /conflicts - List active conflicts
- GET /conflicts/history - Conflict history
- GET /conflicts/stats - Conflict statistics
- GET /conflicts/:id - Conflict details
- POST /conflicts/:id/resolve - Resolve conflict
- POST /conflicts/check/reservation - Check reservation conflicts
- POST /conflicts/scan/git - Scan for git conflicts
- POST /conflicts/scan/contention - Check resource contention

Checkpoint Routes (checkpoints.ts):
- Complete REST API for checkpoint/restore operations
- WebSocket event publishing for checkpoint lifecycle

Message Types (messages.ts):
- Added conflict.updated, conflict.escalated
- Added checkpoint.auto_created

Related: flywheel_gateway-36m, flywheel_gateway-msz

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -24,12 +24,21 @@ export type MessageType =
   | "reservation.expiring"
   // Conflicts
   | "conflict.detected"
+  | "conflict.updated"
   | "conflict.resolved"
+  | "conflict.escalated"
   // DCG
   | "dcg.block"
   | "dcg.warn"
   | "dcg.false_positive"
   | "dcg.allowlist_added"
+  // Checkpoints
+  | "checkpoint.created"
+  | "checkpoint.auto_created"
+  | "checkpoint.restored"
+  | "checkpoint.deleted"
+  | "checkpoint.pruned"
+  | "checkpoint.imported"
   // Agent mail
   | "mail.received"
   // System
@@ -280,7 +289,7 @@ export function createHubMessage(
     channel,
     type,
     payload,
-    metadata,
+    ...(metadata !== undefined && { metadata }),
   };
 }
